DispatchCondition.Title: Applicable to: VN-A861, VN-A862, VN-A863, VN-A864, VN-A867, VN-A868, VN-A870, VN-A871.

DispatchConditionRemarks.Para: May be inoperative or removed provided:

ListItem.Para: Crewmember assigned to the affected position has an equivalent operative flashlight readily available.
Inoperative flashlight remains in a certified location or is removed from the aircraft.
Location placarding is removed or obscured.

DispatchConditionRemarks.Para: May be inoperative or removed provided:

ListItem.Para: Crewmember assigned to the affected position has an equivalent operative flashlight readily available.
Inoperative flashlight remains in a certified location or is removed from the aircraft.
Location placarding is removed or obscured.

DispatchCondition.Title: Applicable to 787-10: VN-A872, VN-A873, VN-A874, VN-A877, VN-A878, VN-A879

DispatchConditionRemarks.Para: May be inoperative or removed provided:

ListItem.Para: Crewmember assigned to the affected position has an equivalent operative flashlight readily available.
Inoperative flashlight remains in a certified location or is removed from the aircraft.
Location placarding is removed or obscured.
A maximum of 19 persons authorized by 14 CFR 121.583 may be carried.
Establish alternate procedures for use when flashlight holder assemblies (including flashlight) are not available.

DispatchConditionRemarks.Para: May be inoperative, damaged, or missing provided proper installation and operation is verified at each preflight.

OperationProcedure.Para: Verify the associated portable flashlights and flashlight holders are properly installed and operate correctly before each flight.
